calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR SHORT CAUSE
Off Calendar May-12-2008 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Compelling Answers To Interrogatories And That Requests For Admissions Be Deemed Admitted For Sanctions;
Off Calendar Apr-14-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCE:
Douglas A. Holloway, Esq., for plaintiff and moving party: Bank of the West

NO OTHER APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Bank of the West's Motion For Order Compelling Answers To Interrogatories And That Request For Admissions Be Deemed Admitted; And For Sanctions is granted in part, and denied in part, as follows:
1. Motion For Order Compelling Answers To For Interrogatories [Set no. One] is granted; defendant shall serve full, complete and verified responses to all interrogatories within seven days of the date of the court's order; all objections deemed waived except for attorney-client privilege and attorney work product privilege;
2. Motion For Order that Request For Admissions Be Deemed Admitted granted as to Request for Admissions 1, 2, and 5, inclusive; and Request For Admissions of Genuineness of Documents 1 and 2.
Sanctions shall issue against defendant and his counsel is the amount of $490.00. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT, NOT REPORTED.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-20-2008 Set For Trial On May-12-08 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
